es.description: Desarrollo de contratos de API con enfoque contract-first, incluyendo herramientas propias para validar cumplimiento de especificaciones OpenAPI/Swagger en proyectos empresariales.
impact: Disene un plugin de Maven personalizado para validar contratos de API JSON/YAML contra especificaciones OpenAPI/Swagger.
Aplique Java Development y practicas de ingenieria en un entorno de proyectos empresariales de gran escala.

en.description: API contract development with a contract-first approach, including internal tooling to validate OpenAPI/Swagger compliance in enterprise projects.
impact: Designed a custom Maven plugin to validate JSON/YAML API contracts against OpenAPI/Swagger specifications.
Applied Java development and engineering practices in a large-scale enterprise project environment.

es.title: Contract-first API development en proyectos empresariales
es.intro: Trabajo enfocado en contratos de API, calidad tecnica y herramientas internas para equipos Java.

sections.heading: Responsabilidades
items: Desarrollo y validacion de contratos REST usando especificaciones OpenAPI/Swagger.
Creacion de tooling interno con Maven para automatizar revisiones de contratos JSON/YAML.
Alineacion de practicas contract-first con flujos de desarrollo empresarial.

sections.heading: Impacto tecnico
items: Reduje validaciones manuales al convertir reglas de contrato en checks automatizables.
Fortaleci la consistencia entre especificaciones, implementaciones y buenas practicas de equipo.

en.title: Contract-first API development for enterprise projects
en.intro: Work focused on API contracts, technical quality, and internal tooling for Java teams.

sections.heading: Responsibilities
items: Developed and validated REST contracts using OpenAPI/Swagger specifications.
Created internal Maven tooling to automate JSON/YAML contract reviews.
Aligned contract-first practices with enterprise development workflows.

sections.heading: Technical impact
items: Reduced manual validation by turning contract rules into automatable checks.
Improved consistency between specifications, implementations, and team practices.

es.company: CCED - Centro de Capacitacion y Educacion Dirigida
es.description: Desarrollo end-to-end del sitio institucional y de software interno de gestion academica y financiera.
impact: Disene e implemente el sitio web oficial de CCED con cursos, programas, informacion legal, FAQs y recursos para empresas.
Desarrolle software institucional para gestion de estudiantes, pagos, notas y asistencia.

en.company: CCED - Directed Training and Education Center
en.description: End-to-end development of the institutional website and internal academic and financial management software.
impact: Designed and implemented CCED's official website with courses, programs, legal information, FAQs, and business resources.
Built institutional software for student management, payments, grades, and attendance.

es.title: Sitio institucional y plataforma academica interna
es.intro: Rol con alcance end-to-end: presencia web publica, herramientas internas y soporte a procesos academicos.

sections.heading: Producto web
items: Construccion del sitio institucional para publicar cursos, programas y contenido informativo.
Organizacion de informacion legal, FAQs y recursos orientados a empresas.

sections.heading: Software interno
items: Gestion de estudiantes, pagos, notas y asistencia.
Flujos para que profesores registraran calificaciones y estudiantes consultaran progreso academico.

en.title: Institutional website and internal academic platform
en.intro: End-to-end role covering public web presence, internal tools, and academic operations.

sections.heading: Web product
items: Built the institutional website to publish courses, programs, and informational content.
Organized legal information, FAQs, and business-oriented resources.

sections.heading: Internal software
items: Managed students, payments, grades, and attendance flows.
Supported teachers registering grades and students checking academic progress.

es.description: Desarrollo de multiples aplicaciones internas para gestion de contratos, talento humano e innovacion colaborativa.
impact: Desarrolle aplicaciones para generar contratos, consultar historicos, gestionar talento humano y apoyar procesos de onboarding.
Construi plataformas internas para ideas, recompensas y seguimiento de solicitudes de nuevas aplicaciones.

en.description: Development of multiple internal applications for contract management, human talent, and collaborative innovation.
impact: Built applications to generate contracts, view history, manage talent information, and support onboarding processes.
Built internal platforms for ideas, rewards, and tracking new internal application requests.

es.title: Aplicaciones internas para operaciones y colaboracion
es.intro: Desarrollo de herramientas para contratos, talento humano, ideas internas y seguimiento de requerimientos.

sections.heading: Aplicaciones construidas
items: Sistema de gestion de contratos para generar, consultar historicos y descargar documentos.
Aplicacion de talento humano para centralizar colaboradores y talentos potenciales.
Plataforma de ideas con estados, seguimiento y recompensas canjeables.

sections.heading: Gestion de solicitudes
items: Sistema para registrar solicitudes de nuevas aplicaciones internas.
Flujos de revision con comentarios, capturas y retroalimentacion.

en.title: Internal applications for operations and collaboration
en.intro: Development of tools for contracts, human talent, internal ideas, and request tracking.

sections.heading: Applications built
items: Contract management system to generate, view history, and download documents.
Human talent app to centralize collaborators and potential talent records.
Ideas platform with statuses, tracking, and redeemable rewards.

sections.heading: Request management
items: System to register requests for new internal applications.
Review flows with comments, screenshots, and feedback.
